title: Medium Publication
description: A Medium publication that aggregates posts from multiple contributors around a shared topic or brand, including its metadata and contributor information.

id.description: The unique identifier for the publication.

name.description: The name of the publication as displayed on Medium.

description.description: A short description of the publication's focus or mission.

url.description: The URL to the publication's homepage on Medium.

imageUrl.description: The URL to the publication's logo or header image.

contributors.description: The list of editors and writers who contribute to the publication.

Contributor.description: A contributor to a Medium publication with a specific editorial role.

publicationId.description: The unique identifier of the publication the contributor belongs to.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the contributing user.

role.description: The role of the contributor within the publication. Editors can manage all content while writers can submit drafts.
